ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Pincode of the office */,
  "officename" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., B.O, S.O) */,
  "deliverystatus" TEXT /* Delivery status of the office */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the office belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the office belongs to */,
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circle the office belongs to */,
  "taluk_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taluk the office belongs to */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the office belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the office belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the office */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the office location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the office location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the office */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the office */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Main contact number of the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address of the office */,
  "office_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_circle_id FOREIGN KEY ("circle_id") REFERENCES circles ("circle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_taluk_id FOREIGN KEY ("taluk_id") REFERENCES taluk ("taluk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pincode" (
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Pincode */,
  "offices" INTEGER /* Number of offices in the pincode */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name associated with the pincode */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area name associated with the pincode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pincode")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_types" (
  "office_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office type */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Name of the office type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_status" (
  "deliverystatus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery status */,
  "deliverystatus" TEXT /* Name of the delivery status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverystatus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "divisionname" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the division */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "regionname" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circle the region belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the region */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circles" (
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circle */,
  "circlename" TEXT /* Name of the circle */,
  "taluk_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taluk the circle belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the circle */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the circle */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the circle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taluk" (
  "taluk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taluk */,
  "Taluk" TEXT /* Name of the taluk */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the taluk belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taluk */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the taluk */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the taluk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taluk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "Districtname" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "statename" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the state */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, office manager, employee) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_hierarchies" (
  "office_hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office hierarchy */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "parent_office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent office */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the office in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_hierarchies_parent_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_hierarchies_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_contacts" (
  "office_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office contact */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the contact person */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact person was last contacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_office_contacts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office making the delivery */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., delivered, pending) */,
  "delivery_type" TEXT /* Type of delivery (e.g., regular, express) */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "recipient_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  "package_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the package */,
  "package_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)
